meaning: n.(尤指经营典当的)放债者
examples: Your profession was that of a banker , usurer , moneylender or judge.
You can borrow money from a moneylender named Shylock. He always has money on hand.
The cunning female moneylender suggested that they let Providence decide the matter.
Four hundred years ago, a fabulously wealthy arms dealer and moneylender named Thomas Sutton was approaching death.
Out of desperation and with the help of her relatives, Silvia managed to pay the money to the moneylender eventually.
